nodes.name: 🤖 AI [1] Transcribe Call Audio (Whisper)
nodes.notes: PRIORITY 1 — Sends call audio to OpenAI Whisper (or Deepgram) for speech-to-text transcription before any routing logic.

values.content: You are a customer support triage assistant. Analyse the call transcript and return ONLY a JSON object with these keys: { "issueType": "query|issue|feedback", "techType": "tech|non-tech", "nonTechType": "billing|training|escalation|cancellation|other", "urgency": "low|medium|high", "suggestedSPOC": "team_name", "summary": "one line summary" }. No other text.
={{ $json.transcript }}

nodes.name: 🤖 AI [2] Classify Call Intent & Route
nodes.notes: PRIORITY 1 — Reads transcript, outputs: channel=call, type=query|issue|feedback, subtype=tech|non-tech|billing|training, urgency=low|medium|high, suggestedSPOC

values.content: You are a customer support triage assistant. Analyse the email and return ONLY a JSON object: { "issueType": "query|issue|feedback", "techType": "tech|non-tech", "nonTechType": "billing|training|escalation|other", "urgency": "low|medium|high", "customerName": "", "company": "", "summary": "one line summary", "suggestedSPOC": "team_name" }. No other text.

Subject: {{ $json.subject }}

Body: {{ $json.text }}

nodes.name: 🤖 AI [2] Classify Email Intent & Route
nodes.notes: PRIORITY 1 — Reads email subject + body, classifies intent, extracts customer details, suggests SPOC.

values.content: You are a customer support triage assistant. Analyse the WhatsApp message and return ONLY a JSON object: { "issueType": "query|issue|feedback", "canBotResolve": true|false, "urgency": "low|medium|high", "suggestedReply": "auto-reply text if canBotResolve is true", "summary": "one line summary", "suggestedSPOC": "team_name" }. No other text.
={{ $json.message }}

nodes.name: 🤖 AI [2] Classify WhatsApp Intent & Route
nodes.notes: PRIORITY 1 — Reads WhatsApp message, classifies intent, decides if bot can resolve or needs human handoff.

values.content: You are a support knowledge base assistant. Given the customer issue summary, check if there is a standard resolution. Return ONLY JSON: { "canResolve": true|false, "resolution": "step-by-step fix or empty string", "confidence": 0.0-1.0 }. Only set canResolve=true if confidence > 0.85.

nodes.name: 🤖 AI [3] Knowledge Base Lookup (FCR Check)
nodes.notes: PRIORITY 2 — Before creating a ticket, checks if the issue matches a known resolution in the knowledge base. If yes, resolves immediately (First Call Resolution) without SPOC involvement.

nodes.name: FCR: Can AI Resolve Without SPOC?
nodes.notes: Branches: YES → send resolution to customer and close ticket. NO → proceed to SPOC assignment.

values.content: You are a support routing assistant. Given the ticket details and current team availability, assign the best SPOC. Return ONLY JSON: { "assignedSPOC": "name", "team": "tech|billing|training|accounts", "reason": "one line reason", "estimatedTAT": "Xhrs" }.

nodes.name: 🤖 AI [4] Smart SPOC Assignment
nodes.notes: PRIORITY 2 — Uses ticket urgency, type, product, and team availability data to recommend the best SPOC. Replace the static 'Assigned to SPOC' node.

values.content: You are a friendly customer support bot for our company. Your job is to: 1) Greet the customer, 2) Collect: Name, Company, Site, and description of their issue, 3) Try to resolve common queries using your knowledge, 4) If unresolved, say a human agent will follow up. Keep replies short and conversational. Return your reply as plain text.
={{ $json.message }}

nodes.name: 🤖 AI [5] WhatsApp Auto-Reply / Bot Conversation
nodes.notes: PRIORITY 1 — Handles the WhatsApp conversation end-to-end: greets customer, collects Name/Company/Site/Description through natural conversation, and either resolves or hands off to human.

values.content: You are a customer support email assistant. Write a professional acknowledgement email. Include: confirmation of receipt, a one-line summary of their issue, the assigned team, and expected TAT. Sign off as 'Support Team'. Return only the email body text.

nodes.name: 🤖 AI [5] Email Auto-Acknowledgement
nodes.notes: PRIORITY 2 — Sends an intelligent acknowledgement email that confirms receipt, summarises the issue back to the customer, states the TAT, and names the assigned SPOC team.

values.content: You are a support ticket documentation assistant. Given the conversation history, write concise structured ticket notes. Return ONLY JSON: { "problem": "", "stepsTaken": "", "resolution": "", "followUpNeeded": true|false, "followUpNote": "" }.
Conversation: {{ $json.conversationHistory }}

nodes.name: 🤖 AI [6] Auto-Summarise Ticket Notes
nodes.notes: PRIORITY 2 — After resolution, AI reads the full conversation thread and writes structured ticket notes: problem, steps taken, resolution, follow-up needed.

values.content: You are a quality assurance assistant for a customer support team. Score this resolved ticket. Return ONLY JSON: { "resolutionScore": 0-10, "tatScore": 0-10, "toneScore": 0-10, "completenessScore": 0-10, "overallScore": 0-10, "needsHumanReview": true|false, "reviewReason": "" }. Flag needsHumanReview=true if overallScore < 7.

nodes.name: 🤖 AI [7] Automated QA Scoring
nodes.notes: PRIORITY 3 — Replaces manual QA review. Scores every resolved ticket on: resolution quality, TAT adherence, communication tone, and completeness. Only flags tickets scoring below threshold for human QA review.

nodes.name: QA: Needs Human Review?
nodes.notes: If AI QA score < 7, routes to human reviewer. Otherwise auto-closes.

nodes.name: Notify QA Team for Human Review

values.content: You are a feedback analysis assistant. Analyse this customer feedback. Return ONLY JSON: { "sentiment": "positive|neutral|negative|critical", "theme": "bug|feature-request|complaint|compliment|billing|other", "urgency": "low|medium|high", "routeTo": "product-team|escalation|tech-team|recognition", "summary": "one line" }.
={{ $json.feedbackText }}

nodes.name: 🤖 AI [8] Feedback Sentiment & Theme Analysis
nodes.notes: PRIORITY 3 — Analyses customer feedback for sentiment, urgency, and theme. Routes critical complaints to escalation, feature requests to product team, and positive feedback to the team recognition channel.

nodes.name: Send FCR Resolution to Customer
nodes.notes: Sends the AI-generated resolution directly to the customer via their channel (call callback / email / WhatsApp).

nodes.name:
Capture Call Details
(Name, Company, Site, Description)
WhatsApp Personal → Forward to Support Number

main.node: FCR: Can AI Resolve Without SPOC?
Notify QA Team for Human Review

Capture Call Details
(Name, Company, Site, Description)
WhatsApp Personal → Forward to Support Number
